title: Onboard New Customer
summary: Prepare project kickoff notes and assign owners.
body: Collect requirements, schedule kickoff call, and prepare starter assets for the customer success team.

title: Audit Analytics Tags
summary: Verify tracking coverage on marketing pages.
body: Check UTM mappings, event naming consistency, and dashboard attribution accuracy.

title: Release v3.2
summary: Coordinate production release with QA sign-off.
body: Confirm regression tests pass, monitor logs post-deploy, and publish release notes.

title: Design Dashboard Widgets
summary: Create component specs for KPI cards.
body: Define card states, responsive behavior, and color tokens for default and alert states.

title: Fix Login Redirect Bug
summary: Users are redirected to home instead of dashboard.
body: Inspect route guard state handling and preserve the original destination path in location state.

title: Refactor useFetch Hook
summary: Unify API loading and error handling logic.
body: Move repeated fetch patterns to a reusable hook and update all consumers to use it.

title: Prepare Sprint Demo
summary: Collect screenshots and metrics for presentation.
body: Build a short storyline: problem, implementation highlights, and measurable impact.

title: Add 404 Page
summary: Handle unknown paths with a fallback route.
body: Implement wildcard router path and include a clear CTA back to the home page.

title: Improve Mobile Navigation
body: Adjust nav spacing, enable wrapping, and test tap target sizes across breakpoints.

title: Write Reflection Answers
summary: Document lessons learned for hooks and context.
body: Answer all reflection questions clearly and include examples from the implemented app.

title: Persist Theme Setting
body: Store theme mode in localStorage and initialize context state from saved value.

title: Test Protected Routes
body: Ensure /dashboard and /dashboard/items/:id both redirect to /login when logged out.
